messages.content: Hi! I just came out with a girl that can save IRL like in an emulator of some game console and she have several save slots, She at first reveled in her strength: she became in different timelines the richest person in the world, ruled Earth as dictator, a creator of most popular rock-group in the Earth etc. But then she wants to die, because her live became boring because she remembers all previous timelines and she can predict every person in the world, but she can’t die because if she’ll die she’ll just return to the moment when she was 6yo, when she discovered that she can save and her body’ll be in an same condition, that was in a moment of saving, for example, if her leg was amputated after saving, when she would load her save, her leg would recover. In Chapter 1 she’ll discover her ability, in chapters 2-4 she’ll enjoy her ability, in Chapters 5-7 she’ll try to get rid of her ability and die, and in chapters 8-10 she’ll try to understand why she was given her ability

Title: Infinite Lives

Chapter 1: The Discovery
Six-year-old Megan unintentionally slips on a wet floor and hits her head on the edge of a table, briefly losing consciousness. When she wakes up, she realizes she saved her life moments before the accident. She tests her newfound power, amazed by the ability to save her life and rewind time like a video game emulator.

Chapter 2: The Unlimited Possibilities
As Megan grows up, she uses her power not only to save herself from danger but also to explore the world and its opportunities. She becomes a billionaire, travels the globe, and even assembles the world's most successful rock band, The Timelines.

Chapter 3: The Ultimate Power
Megan's ability to manipulate time brings her more power than she could have ever imagined. She saves and loads her life intelligently and strategically, ruling countries and becoming a dictator in some timelines. Her name is known and feared across multiple timelines.

Chapter 4: The Downfall
Sudden fame and success make the people around Megan become predictable and her life monotonous. She yearns for challenge and excitement once again, ultimately deciding that the only unknown she has yet to conquer is death.

Chapter 5: The Attempt
Megan purposefully puts herself in dangerous situations, attempting to end her life and escape her predictable existence. Each time, she is saved and returned to her six-year-old self – her body unharmed and her memory intact.

Chapter 6: The Desperation
With countless deaths escaping her grasp, Megan becomes more desperate to end her life. In her despair, she studies ancient tomes and consults mystics in search of a solution, only to be disappointed time and again.

Chapter 7: The Choice
Facing the reality of her immortality, Megan is forced to accept her fate. She decides that if she cannot die, she will instead focus on understanding the origins and purpose of her power.

Chapter 8: The Investigation
Megan invests her unlimited time and resources into uncovering the truth of her gift. Her journey takes her to the far corners of the world, from the highest mountaintops to the depths of the ocean, searching for the unknown.

Chapter 9: The Revelation
Megan's journey leads her to a remote temple where she meets an ancient being who reveals the origin of her powers. She learns that she is part of a lineage of time manipulateors tasked with protecting humanity from an unknown threat in the future.

Chapter 10: The Acceptance
Understanding her purpose and legacy, Megan embraces her power and immortality. She returns home with renewed vigor and the knowledge that she has the power to shape humanity's destiny. Megan accepts her role as guardian and begins to prepare for the unknown challenges that lie ahead.

In Chapter 2.1 she became a billionaire because she invented a personal quantum computer, found a company QElectronics, began mass production of the "QElectronics QPC" line, which consists of five models from the younger QPC 100 to the older QPC 150 and began to build the quantum internet

Chapter 2.1: The Quantum Path

Fascinated by the potential of quantum computing, Megan dedicates her time to studying advanced mathematics, physics, and engineering. Using her ability to save and load timelines, she goes back repeatedly to revise her designs and speed up her learning process.

After years of dedication, Megan successfully invents the world's first personal quantum computer and founds QElectronics. Her cutting-edge device, named QPC (Quantum Personal Computer), takes the world by storm, and she releases five different models: QPC 100, QPC 110, QPC 120, QPC 130, and QPC 150, catering to various consumer needs.

Meanwhile, Megan works tirelessly to build a virtually unbreakable and infinitely fast quantum internet. This groundbreaking innovation revolutionizes the way humans communicate and share data, solidifying Megan's status as a billionaire and a key figure in the world of technology. These achievements catapult Megan into an unmatched level of success and serve as just one example of her unlimited ventures in various timelines.
No, six models

Chapter 2.1: The Quantum Path

Fascinated by the potential of quantum computing, Megan dedicates her time to studying advanced mathematics, physics, and engineering. Using her ability to save and load timelines, she goes back repeatedly to revise her designs and speed up her learning process.

After years of dedication, Megan successfully invents the world's first personal quantum computer and founds QElectronics. Her cutting-edge device, named QPC (Quantum Personal Computer), takes the world by storm, and she releases six different models: QPC 100, QPC 110, QPC 120, QPC 130, QPC 140, and QPC 150, catering to various consumer needs.

Meanwhile, Megan works tirelessly to build a virtually unbreakable and infinitely fast quantum internet. This groundbreaking innovation revolutionizes the way humans communicate and share data, solidifying Megan's status as a billionaire and a key figure in the world of technology. These achievements catapult Megan into an unmatched level of success and serve as just one example of her unlimited ventures in various timelines.

But even QPC 100, that costs only $999 can render 3D images by raytracing without rasterization without much effort and remaining computing resources can be used to make such realistic physics that it was impossible to do even on the most powerful supercomputer before and make enemies and NPCs smarter using neural networks

Chapter 2.1: The Quantum Path (revised)

Fascinated by the potential of quantum computing, Megan dedicates her time to studying advanced mathematics, physics, and engineering. Using her ability to save and load timelines, she goes back repeatedly to revise her designs and speed up her learning process.

After years of dedication, Megan successfully invents the world's first personal quantum computer and founds QElectronics. Her cutting-edge device, named QPC (Quantum Personal Computer), takes the world by storm, and she releases six different models: QPC 100, QPC 110, QPC 120, QPC 130, QPC 140, and QPC 150, catering to various consumer needs.

Even the most affordable model, the QPC 100, priced at just $999, boasts incredible computing power. It can seamlessly render highly detailed 3D images without rasterization, thanks to its advanced built-in raytracing capability. Additionally, the QPC 100's remaining computing resources can simulate hyper-realistic physics that were previously impossible to achieve, even on supercomputers. Its neural networks are capable of processing complex information that creates highly intelligent AI, rendering NPCs and enemies in games with unprecedented cognitive abilities.

Meanwhile, Megan works tirelessly to build a virtually unbreakable and infinitely fast quantum internet. This groundbreaking innovation revolutionizes the way humans communicate and share data, solidifying Megan's status as a billionaire and a key figure in the world of technology. These achievements catapult Megan into an unmatched level of success and serve as just one example of her unlimited ventures in various timelines.
No, ray tracing by software rendering, not by built-in raytracing capability

Chapter 2.1: The Quantum Path (revised)

Fascinated by the potential of quantum computing, Megan dedicates her time to studying advanced mathematics, physics, and engineering. Using her ability to save and load timelines, she goes back repeatedly to revise her designs and speed up her learning process.

After years of dedication, Megan successfully invents the world's first personal quantum computer and founds QElectronics. Her cutting-edge device, named QPC (Quantum Personal Computer), takes the world by storm, and she releases six different models: QPC 100, QPC 110, QPC 120, QPC 130, QPC 140, and QPC 150, catering to various consumer needs.

Even the most affordable model, the QPC 100, priced at just $999, boasts incredible computing power. It can seamlessly render highly detailed 3D images using software-based ray tracing without the need for built-in ray tracing hardware. Additionally, the QPC 100's remaining computing resources can simulate hyper-realistic physics that were previously impossible to achieve, even on supercomputers. Its neural networks are capable of processing complex information that creates highly intelligent AI, rendering NPCs and enemies in games with unprecedented cognitive abilities.

Meanwhile, Megan works tirelessly to build a virtually unbreakable and infinitely fast quantum internet. This groundbreaking innovation revolutionizes the way humans communicate and share data, solidifying Megan's status as a billionaire and a key figure in the world of technology. These achievements catapult Megan into an unmatched level of success and serve as just one example of her unlimited ventures in various timelines.
It can render that images in 120fps

Fascinated by the potential of quantum computing, Megan dedicates her time to studying advanced mathematics, physics, and engineering. Using her ability to save and load timelines, she goes back repeatedly to revise her designs and speed up her learning process.

After years of dedication, Megan successfully invents the world's first personal quantum computer and founds QElectronics. Her cutting-edge device, named QPC (Quantum Personal Computer), takes the world by storm, and she releases six different models: QPC 100, QPC 110, QPC 120, QPC 130, QPC 140, and QPC 150, catering to various consumer needs.

Even the most affordable model, the QPC 100, priced at just $999, boasts incredible computing power. It can seamlessly render highly detailed 3D images using software-based ray tracing without the need for built-in ray tracing hardware, all while maintaining a remarkable 120 frames per second. Additionally, the QPC 100's remaining computing resources can simulate hyper-realistic physics that were previously impossible to achieve, even on supercomputers. Meanwhile, Megan works tirelessly to build a virtually unbreakable and infinitely fast quantum internet. This groundbreaking innovation revolutionizes the way humans communicate and share data, solidifying Megan's status as a billionaire and a key figure in the world of technology. These achievements catapult Megan into an unmatched level of success and serve as just one example of her unlimited ventures in various timelines.

I would write this "Additionally, the QPC 100’s remaining computing resources can simulate hyper-realistic physics that were previously impossible to achieve, even on supercomputers and neural network based AI for enemies and NPCs."

QElectronics entered into a partnership with Google to write an OS for QPC in chapter 2.1

Chapter 2.1: The Quantum Path (revised)

Fascinated by the potential of quantum computing, Megan dedicates her time to studying advanced mathematics, physics, and engineering. Using her ability to save and load timelines, she goes back repeatedly to revise her designs and speed up her learning process.

After years of dedication, Megan successfully invents the world's first personal quantum computer and founds QElectronics. Her cutting-edge device, named QPC (Quantum Personal Computer), takes the world by storm, and she releases six different models: QPC 100, QPC 110, QPC 120, QPC 130, QPC 140, and QPC 150, catering to various consumer needs.

Even the most affordable model, the QPC 100, priced at just $999, boasts incredible computing power. It can seamlessly render highly detailed 3D images using software-based ray tracing without the need for built-in ray tracing hardware, all while maintaining a remarkable 120 frames per second. Additionally, the QPC 100’s remaining computing resources can simulate hyper-realistic physics that were previously impossible to achieve, even on supercomputers and neural network based AI for enemies and NPCs.

Recognizing the potential of the QPC series, Google enters into a partnership with QElectronics to develop an operating system specifically designed for the quantum computing capabilities of the QPC lineup. This collaboration results in a seamless user experience that leverages the full power of the QPC's groundbreaking technology.

Meanwhile, Megan works tirelessly to build a virtually unbreakable and infinitely fast quantum internet. This groundbreaking innovation revolutionizes the way humans communicate and share data, solidifying Megan's status as a billionaire and a key figure in the world of technology. These achievements catapult Megan into an unmatched level of success and serve as just one example of her unlimited ventures in various timelines.
Creators of 86Box made an emulator of x86_64 systems for QPC, called 64Box

Chapter 2.2: 64Box - Bringing Emulation on Quantum Computers

As the QPC series dominates the market for personal quantum computers, the demand for compatibility with traditional software and operating systems skyrockets. Recognizing this need, the creators of 86Box, a well-known x86 systems emulator, develop a new emulator specifically for the QPC lineup called 64Box.

64Box becomes an essential tool for users who wish to run applications and games designed for x86_64 systems on their QPC computers. Utilizing the power of personal quantum computers, 64Box provides a seamless experience while emulating even the most resource-demanding games and software.

The development of the groundbreaking 64Box emulator further solidifies QElectronics' and the QPC series' position in the world of technology. Megan's relentless pursuit of innovation results in a rich ecosystem of software and services designed around the capabilities of quantum computers, paving the way for a new era in computing.
Gamers liked QPC

Chapter 2.3: The Quantum Gaming Revolution

As QPCs continue to gain popularity, the gaming community quickly recognizes the potential for next-level gaming experiences powered by personal quantum computers. Gamers are captivated by the high-quality graphics, seamless ray tracing, and advanced AI for NPCs and enemies provided by the QPC series.

The quantum computing capabilities deliver hyper-realistic physics simulations and unparalleled performance, thanks to the 120fps rendering of software-based ray tracing. Such features transform even the most demanding games into visually stunning and deeply immersive gaming experiences.

The partnership between QElectronics and Google in creating an operating system for the QPC series further contributes to the growing gamer interest. With the development of 64Box, players can enjoy all their favorite x86_64 games with enhanced performance.

Game developers also take notice of the QPC series and start creating games specifically designed to leverage the immense power of personal quantum computers. These next-generation games, featuring groundbreaking graphics and gameplay, become exclusive titles for the QPC ecosystem, enticing more gamers to join the quantum computing revolution.

Megan's QPC series not only transforms the technology industry but also revolutionizes gaming, ushering in a new era of entertainment that captivates gamers around the world.
Year later she released a second generation of this computers

Chapter 2.4: QPC Second Generation - Pushing the Boundaries

A year after the groundbreaking launch of the QPC series, Megan and her team at QElectronics astonish the market once more with the release of an even more advanced second-generation lineup. The new models are designed with gamers in mind, featuring improved performance, enhanced graphics, and innovative features that take the gaming experience to even greater heights.

The second-generation QPC series includes upgraded versions of each of the previous models: QPC 200, QPC 210, QPC 220, QPC 230, QPC 240, and QPC 250. Each model boasts improvements in quantum processing power and memory, making game simulations even more realistic, seamless, and responsive.

Megan collaborates with gaming industry leaders to develop new software modules and applications exclusively for the second-generation QPCs. Advanced quantum-based physics engines offer gamers an unprecedented level of immersion. NPCs and enemy AI benefit from sophisticated machine learning algorithms, making gameplay far more challenging and engaging.

To cater to the massive gaming community, QElectronics also unveils a slew of gaming peripherals and accessories, like quantum-powered VR headsets and haptic feedback controllers, which are specifically designed for the second-generation QPC series.

The second-generation QPC solidifies Megan's legacy as a trailblazer in the world of quantum computing technology. QPCs become the must-have devices for gamers and tech enthusiasts alike, carving an innovative path within the industry for years to come.

Half of year later QElectronics released a device, that can immerse a human in a virtual world like in the movie "The Matrix", and Google released a virtual room that a person can enter using this device and with which programs running on a QPC can interact

Chapter 2.5: QMatrix - Stepping into the Virtual World

Just six months after the launch of the second-generation QPC series, QElectronics unveils another groundbreaking device: the QMatrix. Designed to immerse humans in a virtual world with the same degree of realism as seen in the movie "The Matrix," the QMatrix taps into the immense quantum computing power of the QPC series.

Working in close collaboration with Google, the QMatrix allows users to enter a fully customizable virtual room called the Quantum Space, where programs running on the QPC can interact seamlessly with the user. This immersive experience revolutionizes not only gaming but also virtual communication, remote work, and education.

The Quantum Space includes various applications that allow users to fully customize their virtual environment. They can modify the room's appearance, furniture, and even the room's ambient sounds to create truly unique spaces. Users can meet with friends, family, or colleagues from all over the world for collaboration and socialization, further highlighting the compatibility and adaptability of the QMatrix with the QPC series.

The QMatrix gains worldwide attention and popularity, with users eagerly seeking to upgrade their QPC systems to take advantage of this astonishing new piece of technology. As Megan's creations continue to push the boundaries of the imaginable, QElectronics becomes the driving force behind technological advancements and transforms the way people experience and interact within virtual worlds.

Game companies began to make games for this device and they even make MMORPGs. IT-companies began to make metaverses to it. But there was one problem: sometimes people don't leave virtual worlds for days, programming a quantum computer to inject them with nutrients

Chapter 2.6: The Digital Dilemma

Excited by the innovative possibilities brought forth by the QMatrix, game companies start developing games specifically designed for the device. This new wave of immersive gaming includes MMORPGs that provide a level of realism and interaction never before experienced by gamers. Major IT-companies also join the movement by creating metaverses, interconnected virtual spaces that allow people to socialize, work, and explore together.

While the QMatrix opens up an entirely new frontier for virtual experiences, it also presents a pressing problem: people get so engrossed in the virtual worlds that they often don't leave them for days on end. Concerns rise about potential physical and mental health consequences arising from prolonged immersion in the virtual realm.

To address this issue, QElectronics pioneers a technology that allows the QPC to provide users with essential nutrients while they're immersed in the QMatrix, ensuring that their physical well-being is maintained during extended periods of virtual interaction. However, this solution raises ethical debates and questions about the limits of human dependence on technology.

As the QMatrix transforms the way people interact with technology, society is faced with the challenge of balancing the benefits of immersive virtual experiences with the potential consequences for personal well-being. This digital dilemma encourages discussions and debates on the responsible use of cutting-edge technology, as people and industries continue to explore the infinite possibilities the QMatrix offers.

Many charitable organizations've emerged to treat and rehabilitate VR addicts, and these organizations also call don't buy QMatrix. And QElectronics implemented a parental control function in Quantum OS, which, in addition to standard functions, can limit the time a child spends in virtual reality

Chapter 2.7: Finding Balance in the Virtual World

As the QMatrix progressively takes over the digital landscape, many charitable organizations emerge to help treat and rehabilitate VR addicts. Acknowledging the potential negative consequences of prolonged immersion, these organizations caution against the purchase and use of the QMatrix, emphasizing the importance of maintaining a balance between virtual and real-life experiences.

In response to growing concerns, QElectronics implements a parental control function in the Quantum OS. This feature allows parents and guardians to manage their children's virtual reality experiences effectively. In addition to conventional parental control options such as content filtering and time restrictions, this feature also includes the ability to limit the time a child can spend immersed in the virtual world.

The introduction of these parental controls serves to address many of the ethical concerns raised around the QMatrix. As the discussion surrounding the balance between virtual and real-world experiences continues to develop, QElectronics strives to stay ahead of the curve. By implementing features that promote responsible use of the technology, the company leads the way in ensuring that its innovations positively impact the world while minimizing potential harms.

The story of Megan and QElectronics serves as a powerful reminder that with great power comes great responsibility. As technology continues to evolve and push the boundaries of what is possible, maintaining a balance between progress and the well-being of users remains a crucial focus.

And the WHO introduced VR addiction into the ICD of a new revision the main diagnostic criterion for this disease is "systematic, lasting more than three full days a week, sessions of staying in virtual reality of a full simulation"

Chapter 2.8: Virtual Reality Addiction - A New Challenge

As the popularity of the QMatrix and other immersive virtual reality technologies continues to grow, the World Health Organization (WHO) takes note of the emerging trend of VR addiction. In response to this growing concern, the WHO adds VR addiction as a new entry in the International Classification of Diseases (ICD) of the latest revision.

The primary diagnostic criterion for VR addiction is defined as "systematic, lasting more than three full days a week, sessions of staying in virtual reality of a full simulation." This inclusion in the ICD brings global attention to the issue and prompts governments, healthcare providers, and tech companies to take swift action to address the potential consequences of VR overuse.

In addition to the parental control features and ethical guidelines provided by QElectronics, awareness campaigns are launched around the globe to educate the public about the risks associated with VR addiction. Counseling and support services are put in place to help those struggling with this new technological challenge.

The inclusion of VR addiction in the ICD highlights the delicate balance between embracing new technological advances and preserving the emotional and physical well-being of users. As a result, the world begins to explore and develop strategies to ensure the responsible and sustainable use of immersive technologies, ultimately shaping a healthier future relationship between humans and the ever-evolving digital landscape.
People managed to find balance. And QElectronics released the third gen of their QPC and they released also a first quantum smartphone

Chapter 2.9: The Third Generation and Beyond

As awareness grows surrounding VR addiction, people around the world begin adapting and finding balance between the virtual and real realms. This helps to create a more sustainable future for immersive technology and paves the way for new innovations from QElectronics.

Building on the success of the first two generations of QPCs, Megan and her team at QElectronics release the eagerly-awaited third generation of their quantum personal computers. The QPC 300 series offers even more powerful performance, enhanced features, and improved usability, further solidifying QElectronics as the leader in quantum computing technology.

In addition to the launch of the QPC 300 series, QElectronics surprises the world with the introduction of the first-ever quantum smartphone. This groundbreaking device merges the power of quantum computing with the convenience and portability of a smartphone, revolutionizing the way people communicate, work, and interact with technology on the go.

The quantum smartphone offers unparalleled processing power, enabling users to access the most advanced applications and features in a sleek, portable device. It is also fully compatible with the QMatrix, allowing users to engage in immersive experiences anytime and anywhere.

The success of the QPC 300 series and the advent of the quantum smartphone mark a significant milestone in Megan's journey. QElectronics' impact on technology continues to expand as they strive to provide users with cutting-edge tools that enrich and enhance their lives while maintaining a healthy balance between the digital and the physical worlds.
